summary: ANDROID 🟥 FMD | When onboarding and 'Dont allow' for location selected then in FMD in main settings dialog keep showing
scenario: Repeated FMD location collection dialog when onboarding with location access denied
description_clean: When onboarding with 'Don't allow' selected for location access, the FMD location collection dialog keeps popping up repeatedly in the main settings. After enabling location in Android settings and returning to FMD, the alert play button works correctly. The bug appears to reproduce only once initially and then no longer appears.
steps: 1. Open the app and begin onboarding.
2. When prompted for location access, select 'Don't allow'.
3. Navigate to the main settings of the app.
4. Observe the FMD location collection dialog.
5. Note that the dialog keeps popping up repeatedly.
6. Go to Android settings and enable location access for the app.
expected: After enabling location in Android settings and returning to FMD, the alert play button works correctly.
actual: When onboarding with 'Don't allow' selected for location access, the FMD location collection dialog keeps popping up repeatedly in the main settings. The bug appears to reproduce only once initially and then no longer appears.
